mnemonics.title: Stack Operations
mnemonics.content: PuPoPe: Push (add), Pop (remove), Peek (view) - the three main stack operations.

mnemonics.title: Queue Operations
mnemonics.content: EDFr: Enqueue (add at rear), Dequeue (remove from front), Front (view first) - the three main queue operations.

mnemonics.title: LIFO vs FIFO
mnemonics.content: Stack = Plates (Last plate placed is first removed = LIFO). Queue = Line (First person in line is first served = FIFO).

mnemonics.title: Stack Applications
mnemonics.content: FREB: Function calls, Recursion, Expression evaluation, Backtracking - common stack applications.
